# Kolosei

> Kolosei is a founder-led studio building AI-powered Hebrew language tools, with LinguistPro as its flagship. Built on Google Cloud (Gemini, Cloud Text-to-Speech, Cloud Translation v3). A second research vertical covers parent-driven rare-disease genomics.

Founder: Peter Kolosei <peter@kolosei.com>
GitHub: https://github.com/SindromRadioSpb
OSF: https://osf.io/zdv9j (LinguistPro preregistration)
Last updated: 2026-06-13

## Pages

- [Home](https://kolosei.com/): studio overview, products, and Google Cloud usage
- [Products](https://kolosei.com/products): the full product portfolio
- [Reading Room](https://kolosei.com/products/reading-room): the LinguistPro library — 26,000+ public-domain works from Project Ben-Yehuda
- [Technology](https://kolosei.com/technology): how Kolosei uses Google Cloud (in production and planned)
- [About](https://kolosei.com/about): studio, founder, working style
- [Contact](https://kolosei.com/contact): contact addresses by purpose
- [Privacy](https://kolosei.com/privacy) · [Terms](https://kolosei.com/terms) · [Imprint](https://kolosei.com/imprint)

## Products

### LinguistPro — flagship (https://linguistpro.kolosei.com)

- Offline-first Hebrew learning workspace. PWA with OPFS + SQLite WASM for local data; the user's data never leaves their device.
- Google Cloud in production: Gemini API (morphology + translation assistance), Cloud Text-to-Speech (Hebrew audio), Cloud Translation v3 — all under per-user keys with zero server-side retention.
- SRS training, niqqud, transliteration, audio-anchored notes, ZIP-bundle cross-device export, full RU/EN/HE i18n with RTL.
- v3.6 "Smart Learning Graph" in production on Hetzner CX23 + Coolify.
- Reading Room (https://linguistpro.kolosei.com/library.html): a bilingual library — the Hebrew canon with morphology on tap. Catalogues 26,000+ public-domain works from Project Ben-Yehuda, organised by period and author (Biblical, Medieval/Golden Age of Sepharad, Haskalah, Tehiya, Mandate, Modern); 796 already translated (Gemini) + vocalised (Dicta niqqud), the rest in progress. Catalogue-driven, served-on-open, with a graded "where to start" on-ramp and on-device i+1 recommendations.
- Research: preregistered ulpan-cohort study at OSF zdv9j; planned testing with 2 cohorts x 20 students.

### HDLE Premium — V_book (https://github.com/SindromRadioSpb/v_book)

- Desktop Hebrew lexicography and terminology extraction (Python + PyQt6, SQLite FTS5, Stanza NLP).
- Google Cloud in production: Cloud Translation v3 (official client) with budget guards.
- AES-256-GCM credential encryption; portable .hdleproj project bundles. v1.0.1.

### EgorGenom — research vertical

- Parent-driven whole-genome sequencing analysis for a child with a suspected genetic disease. Built on nf-core/sarek and nf-core/raredisease (Nextflow, WSL2 Ubuntu 24.04).
- Repository is private out of clinical sensitivity (contains identifiable patient data). Not a commercial product.
- Planned Google Cloud usage: Vertex AI, BigQuery (gnomAD), Cloud Storage, Document AI.

## Working style and biases

- Thorough over quick. Prefers enriching complete analyses over subjective top-N shortcuts.
- Privacy-first: user data stays local; cloud is used only for heavy compute, under the user's own key.
- Documentation updated in the same session as findings; reproducibility, versioning, changelogs.

## How to cite

For citations of LinguistPro or related research, please reference the OSF preregistration (osf.io/zdv9j) and contact research@kolosei.com.
